data.body:
## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] tests/scripts/test-merge-to-main-version-bump.sh exists and is executable
  Verify: test -x $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/scripts/test-merge-to-main-version-bump.sh
- [ ] bash -n passes on the test file (syntax valid)
  Verify: bash -n $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/scripts/test-merge-to-main-version-bump.sh
- [ ] All 6 tests FAIL (RED) when run against unmodified merge-to-main.sh
  Verify: bash $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/scripts/test-merge-to-main-version-bump.sh 2>&1 | grep -q FAIL
- [ ] Tests use behavioral assertions (execute code, check outputs/side effects), not grep-on-source assertions
  Verify: manual review of test file — no grep against merge-to-main.sh source for function names
- [ ] Test file uses source "$PLUGIN_ROOT/tests/lib/assert.sh" for assertions
  Verify: grep -q 'assert.sh' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/scripts/test-merge-to-main-version-bump.sh
- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh passes (new test file does not break existing suite)
  Verify: bash $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/run-all.sh
